title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 33.330 - Renewal of defaced or mutilated bonds
text:
33.330.  Renewal of defaced or mutilated bonds. — When any bond or bonds or coupons issued by the state shall be so defaced or mutilated as to become unsuitable for negotiation or are in a condition to be lost by further keeping, the owner or owners of such bond or bonds or coupons may have the same renewed on application to the board of fund commissioners.
(RSMo 1939 § 13070, A.L. 1945 p. 1428 § 87) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11453; 1919 § 13359; 1909 § 11860
